chapters.title: Brandon Sanderson - Mistborn 03 - The Hero of Ages

title: Brandon Sanderson - Mistborn 03 - The Hero of Ages
description:
Who is the Hero of Ages?

To end the Final Empire and restore freedom, Vin killed the Lord Ruler. But as a result, the Deepness---the lethal form of the ubiquitous mists---is back, along with increasingly heavy ashfalls and ever more powerful earthquakes.
